channel.title: ToolKit Pro | Developed by Shaheera Sadia
channel.description: Professional image optimization tools and aesthetic design resources.

item.title: Wedtrend Women's Formal Dress - Long Prom & Bridesmaid Dress
item.description: Elegant floral lace halter neck dress, perfect for weddings and formal events.

item.title: MILACOLATO CZ Halo Stud Earrings - 18K Gold Plated
item.description: Hypoallergenic brilliant simulated diamond earrings for sensitive ears.

item.title: MILACOLATO Sterling Silver Cross Necklace for Men & Women
item.description: Solid 925 sterling silver chain with a durable beveled edge cross pendant.

item.title: Family Sized Airfryer Cooker - Large Capacity 3-Layer
item.description: Cook healthy meals for the whole family with this versatile 3-layer air fryer cooker.

item.title: Dual Air Fryer - Double Basket Efficiency
item.description: Save time with double baskets. Perfect for cooking multiple dishes at once.

item.title: Luxury Rose Spa Gift Basket - 8 Pcs Bath Set
item.description: Indulge in a relaxing home spa experience with this premium rose-scented bath set.

item.title: Enchanting Beauty and The Beast Rose - LED Glass Dome
item.description: A magical preserved red rose with LED lights, the perfect romantic gift that lasts forever.

item.title: Galaxy Red Rose - Aesthetic Crystal Decor
item.description: Beautiful crystal rose with butterfly accent. A stunning eternal gift for Mom or loved ones.

item.title: Mom Necklace - Elegant Jewelry Gift
item.description: Show your love with this elegant personalized necklace designed for mothers.

item.title: Minimalist Industrial Table Lamp - Aesthetic Decor
item.description: Vintage-style industrial lamp with a cozy sunset glow. Perfect for bedside tables.

item.title: Elegant Floral Maxi Dress - Summer Fashion
item.description: Aesthetic and comfortable floral dress for a breezy summer look.

item.title: Premium Skin Care Gift Set - Sakura Essence Kit
item.description: Luxurious skincare essentials set for a glowing and healthy skin routine.

item.title: Honey Almond Bath & Body Gift Set
item.description: Nourishing honey and almond scented spa set for a sweet self-care experience.

item.title: Motorola razr+ 2023 - Unlocked Foldable Phone 8/256GB
item.description: Unlocked Magenta edition with 8/256GB storage and a high-resolution 32MP camera. Stylish and powerful foldable smartphone.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra - 512GB Flagship 2026
item.description: The 2026 flagship featuring 512GB storage, Galaxy AI, Privacy Display, and Super Fast Charging 3.0. Unlocked with a 1-year US warranty.

item.title: Stylish Hand Bag - Elegant & Spacious
item.description: Elegant and spacious handbag perfect for any occasion. Transitions effortlessly from work to weekend.

item.title: 925 Sterling Silver Heart Birthstone Bracelet - Gift for Her
item.description: Heart Birthstone Bracelet — Birthday Anniversary Jewelry Gifts for Her and Wife. Real 925 sterling silver for long-lasting shine.

item.title: Rose Heart Initial Necklace - 925 Sterling Silver Gift
item.description: 925 Sterling Silver Initial Necklace — I Love You Gifts for Women, Wife, and Girlfriend. Hypoallergenic and skin-safe.

item.title: ZHMO Canvas Tote Bag - Women's Crossbody Work Laptop Tote
item.description: Women's Crossbody Work Laptop Tote — Large Handbag for Travel, Nurse, and Teacher. Fits a 15-inch laptop with ease.

item.title: 2026 Graduation Gift Basket - College & Master Degree
item.description: Cool College Graduation Gifts Basket. Best Master Degree Grad Gift Box packed with fun and memorable items.

item.title: Personalized Initial Canvas Tote Bag - Monogrammed Beach Bag
item.description: Monogrammed Beach Tote Bag with Zipper — Birthday Gifts for Mom, Sister, and Teacher. Strong canvas with custom monogram.

item.title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Toothbrush - Pressure Sensor
item.description: Sonic Toothbrush with Pressure Sensor, Two Intensity Settings, Smartimer and Quadpacer. Removes up to 7x more plaque than manual.

item.title: Philips Sonicare DiamondClean 9500 - Smart App Toothbrush
item.description: Smart Sonic Toothbrush with App, 15 Brushing Settings, USB Charging, and Travel Case. Professional clean at home.

item.title: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Sunscreen SPF 70 - Oil-Free Matte
item.description: Dry-Touch Water Resistant 80 Min, Oil-Free, Non-Comedogenic, Matte Finish, 3 Fl Oz. Ideal for acne-prone and sensitive skin.

item.title: Anti-Aging Face Moisturizer - Retinol Collagen Hyaluronic Acid
item.description: Firming and Hydrating Day and Night Cream with Retinol, Collagen, and Hyaluronic Acid. Reduces fine lines and wrinkles.

item.title: 100 Pack 16oz Clear Cups with Lids & Straws - Iced Coffee Cups
item.description: 16 oz sturdy food-safe iced coffee cups. Perfect disposable smoothie cups for cold drinks, parties, and cafes.

item.title: AERLANG Massage Gun with Heat - Deep Tissue Pain Relief
item.description: Deep Tissue Back and Neck Massager for Pain Relief. 7 Heads and Silent Motor with heat therapy for muscle recovery.

item.title: VETHIN Princess Bed Canopy - Double Layer Black Drape Netting
item.description: Double-layer black drape netting with 4 openings. Perfect for creating a cozy, aesthetic bedroom retreat for teens and adults.

item.title: Luxury Ruffle Tassel Canopy - 4-Corner White Bedroom Netting
item.description: Elegant 4-corner post white netting with ruffle tassel details. Creates a dreamy, cozy atmosphere for any bedroom.

item.title: 3-Opening Princess Bed Net - 4-Corner Canopy for Queen King Full
item.description: Elegant 4-corner canopy curtains with a unique 3-side opening design. Fits Full, Queen, and King beds for a luxurious bedroom look.

item.title: HelloBaby 5 Inch Video Baby Monitor - No WiFi 30-Hour Battery
item.description: No-WiFi secure monitor with 30-hour battery, Pan-Tilt-Zoom camera, infrared night vision, and 2-way talk for complete baby safety.

item.title: Color Changing Solar Fence Lights - 4-Pack Waterproof LED
item.description: 4-Pack waterproof LED lamps with 7 colorful modes. Easy 1-minute installation for decks, stairs, and pools. Zero electricity cost.

item.title: MXwcy Solar Plant Stand Lamps 2-Pack - Industrial LED Edison
item.description: Industrial-style solar floor lamps with LED Edison bulbs and integrated plant stands. Perfect for porches, yards, and driveways.

item.title: Aesthetic Fake Vines with LED Fairy Lights - 12-Pack Bedroom Decor
item.description: 12-pack of artificial ivy garlands paired with LED fairy lights. Perfect for bedroom wall decor and creating a cozy boho atmosphere.

item.title: Solar Watering Can Lights - Retro Metal Hanging Outdoor Decor
item.description: Large retro metal hanging solar lights with waterproof LED strands. Beautiful outdoor decoration for porches, lawns, and patios.

item.title: Skin Care Essential - Premium Radiant Healthy Skin Formula
item.description: Premium skin care formula for radiant healthy skin. Targets dullness, uneven tone, and dryness for all skin types.

item.title: Aesthetic Vintage Table Lamp - Warm Cozy Ambiance Decor
item.description: Vintage style lamp that adds warm cozy ambiance. Reduces eye strain and complements boho, retro, and minimalist aesthetics.

item.title: Premium Kitchen Oven - Large Capacity Multi-Mode Cooking
item.description: Large capacity oven with multiple cooking modes including bake, broil, and toast. Energy-efficient and fast-heating for family meals.

item.title: Professional Pizza Pan Set - Crispy Crust Non-Stick
item.description: Professional pizza pan for crispy results at home. Perforated design with non-stick coating for restaurant-quality pizza every time.

item.title: Mother's Day Special Gift - Heartfelt Pamper Set for Mom
item.description: Heartfelt gift for the special mother in your life. Thoughtfully chosen items to make her feel truly appreciated and pampered.

item.title: Elegant Fashion Dress - Formal Occasion Wear for Women
item.description: Stunning dress perfect for any formal occasion. Flattering silhouette with wrinkle-resistant fabric for weddings, galas, and dinner parties.

item.title: Gales Luxury Scented Candle - Premium Aromatherapy Home Decor
item.description: Premium scented candle for a calming fragrance. Long burn time and elegant design make it perfect for relaxation and as a thoughtful gift.

item.title: Advanced Skin Care - Deep Nourishing Glowing Formula
item.description: Deep nourishing formula for glowing healthy skin. Targets dark spots, dehydration, and uneven texture for all skin types including sensitive.

item.title: Mom Gift Set - Curated Pamper Box for Mother
item.description: Thoughtful gift set specially curated for mom. Everything she loves in one beautiful box — ideal for Mother's Day, birthdays, or holidays.

item.title: Ergonomic Laptop Table - Portable Foldable Work From Home Desk
item.description: Ergonomic portable table for work from home. Adjustable height and angle with lightweight foldable design for bed, sofa, or floor use.

item.title: Galaxy Rose Gift - Enchanting Crystal Rose for Wife & Girlfriend
item.description: Enchanting crystal rose for wife and girlfriend. Lasts forever as a permanent symbol of love — perfect for anniversaries and Valentine's Day.

item.title: Halter Prom Dress - Formal Floral Lace Bridesmaid Gown
item.description: Formal Floral Lace Bridesmaid Dress with halter neckline. Suitable for prom, weddings, and formal galas in multiple sizes.

item.title: Jewelry Set - Complete Coordinated Gift Set for Mom
item.description: Thoughtful jewelry gift set specially curated for mom. Coordinated pieces for an effortlessly put-together look, perfect for any age or style.

item.title: Preserved Rose Necklace Set - Forever Rose with Music Box
item.description: Forever Rose with Music Box and Necklace. A real preserved rose that never wilts — the ultimate romantic gift for anniversaries and Valentine's Day.

item.title: Hair Tools Travel Bag - Heat Insulated Curling Iron Organizer
item.description: Heat-resistant travel bag for curling irons and straighteners. Pack immediately after use without waiting to cool down. Keep styling tools organized on the go.

item.title: 5 in 1 Hot Air Styler - Blowout Brush Hair Dryer Set
item.description: Blowout Brush Hair Dryer Set that replaces 5 styling tools. Salon-quality blowout at home with interchangeable heads for curl, straighten, and volumize.

item.title: Leafael Infinity Love Birthstone Necklace - Mother's Day Gift
item.description: Silver-plated heart pendant with crystal birthstone and adjustable 18 plus 2 inch chain. Perfect for Mother's Day or anniversaries with a personal touch.

item.title: PURSEILVER 4-Piece Rose Gold Jewelry Set - Watch Necklace Earrings Bracelet
item.description: Elegant 4-piece jewelry set including a watch, necklace, earrings, and bracelet. The perfect all-in-one gift for her birthday or anniversary.

item.title: BeryLove Sequin Formal Cocktail Dress - High-Low Bridesmaid Gown
item.description: Elegant high-low bridesmaid and prom dress featuring sequin lace and a romantic silhouette. Perfect for formal wedding guests and cocktail parties.

item.title: BeryLove Formal Lace Prom Dress - 2026 Wedding Guest Dress
item.description: Elegant 2026 wedding guest dress featuring a lace bodice, cocktail-length slit, and a flowing romantic silhouette for proms and formal dinners.

item.title: RUBFAC Black Balloon Arch Kit 129pcs - Graduation Party Decor
item.description: Professional-grade garland kit with multiple balloon sizes from 5 to 18 inches. Ideal for graduations, casino themes, and sleek birthday celebrations.

item.title: Amico 6 Inch Ultra-Thin LED Recessed Lights - 24-Pack Dimmable
item.description: 24-Pack of dimmable canless wafer downlights with 5CCT color options. Includes junction boxes for easy slim-fit ceiling installation.

item.title: SIEPASA Inverted Windproof Umbrella - Hands-Free C-Handle UV Protection
item.description: Innovative upside-down folding design with a C-shape handle for hands-free use. Double-layer vented canopy that is windproof and UV-protective.

item.title: Preserved Rose Gift Set - Forever Rose with Music Box & Necklace
item.description: A real rose preserved to last forever. Combined with a music box and necklace for an unforgettable romantic gift on anniversaries or Valentine's Day.
